title: Stress-Testing Agents with Snowglobe
tagline: Know your agent holds up before users do: simulate thousands of conversations with Snowglobe.

story.problem: You've built, grounded, and hardened your agent — but you still don't know how it behaves across the thousands of conversations you'll never hand-test.
story.solution: Use Snowglobe to generate synthetic personas and conversation scenarios, run them against the agent at scale, and score the transcripts for failures, regressions, and edge-case behaviour.
story.outcome: A simulation suite that runs in CI and tells you — with evidence — whether a change made the agent better or worse before it ships.

prerequisites: A LangSmith API key (https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/home) — Snowglobe (https://snowglobetx.com) runs on LangChain's platform

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY and LANGSMITH_API_KEY

endpoints.description: Run the agent under test and stream SSE events back.
Launch a Snowglobe simulation batch against the agent and return scored results.
